pipeline.input_prompt: Build a job portal where candidates can manage recruiter-only pages.

stage_status.summary: Normalized permissions, deduped surfaces, and completed business rules.
Simulated routes, UI, API, DB, auth, permissions, and business rules.

app.name: Job Portal Builder
app.description: Build a job portal where candidates can manage recruiter-only pages.

intent.primary_goal: Build a job portal where candidates can manage recruiter-only pages.

entities.name: candidate
entities.description: Candidate records used by the job_portal app.

entities.name: recruiter
entities.description: Recruiter records used by the job_portal app.

entities.name: job_post
entities.description: Job Post records used by the job_portal app.

entities.name: application
entities.description: Application records used by the job_portal app.

design.data_model_summary: 4 domain entities compiled into relational tables with inferred relationships.
design.business_rules_summary: Role access, ownership checks, CRUD permissions, and audit-safe persistence.
design.summary: Build a job portal where candidates can manage recruiter-only pages.

business_logic.name: role-access
business_logic.description: Protected pages and APIs require declared roles and permissions.

business_logic.name: ownership-restriction
business_logic.description: Users may update only records they own unless they have manage permission.

steps: rendered page Login with auth layout
rendered page Dashboard with dashboard layout
rendered page Candidates with crud layout
rendered page Recruiters with crud layout
rendered page Job Posts with crud layout
rendered page Applications with crud layout
created table candidates(created_at, description, id, name, owner_id)
created table recruiters(created_at, description, id, name, owner_id)
created table job_posts(created_at, description, id, name, owner_id)
created table applications(created_at, description, id, name, owner_id)
created table users(email, id, password_hash, role)
